channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New polling data on Platner brings bad news for Democrats
Trump says US military eliminated 'infamous' Tren de Aragua leader in lethal strike
item.description: President Donald Trump announced a U.S. military strike killed Tren de Aragua leader NiÃ±o Guerrero, calling it retribution for victims.

item.title: House Democrats blame racism, 'all-White' jury for Karmelo Anthony guilty verdict
item.description: House Democrats argue the Karmelo Anthony guilty verdict reflects racism in the justice system, citing jury selection concerns.

item.title: Sen. Rick Scott ends hold on Coast Guard promotions
item.description: Sen. Rick Scott, R-Fla., announced Thursday he lifted his two-month hold on Coast Guard promotions.
